description: Secure secret sharing between hex-nexus and agents for local API inference servers, using SpacetimeDB for grant coordination and hex-hub as the secret broker.

tasks.title: secret-grant WASM module
tasks.description: New SpacetimeDB module with private secret_grant table and public inference_endpoint table. Reducers: grant_secret, revoke_secret, claim_grant, register_endpoint, remove_endpoint, update_health, prune_expired.
tasks.tests: Reducer unit tests (grant → claim → expire lifecycle)

tasks.title: Secret grant domain types (Rust)
tasks.description: Domain types for hex-agent: SecretGrant, InferenceEndpoint, GrantPurpose enum, ClaimResult.

tasks.title: Inference provider domain types (TypeScript)
tasks.description: Extend LLMProvider to include 'ollama' | 'openai-compatible'. Add InferenceEndpoint value object to domain/value-objects.ts.

tasks.title: ISecretBrokerPort (Rust)
tasks.description: Port trait in hex-agent for secret resolution: resolve_secret(key) -> Result<String>, claim_secrets(agent_id) -> Result<HashMap<String, String>>.

tasks.title: IInferenceDiscoveryPort (TypeScript)
tasks.description: Port for discovering and health-checking inference endpoints. Methods: listEndpoints(), registerEndpoint(), healthCheck().

tasks.title: SpacetimeDB secret-grant bindings (Rust)
tasks.description: Generate and integrate Rust client bindings for the secret-grant module into hex-nexus.

tasks.title: hex-agent EnvSecretsAdapter (Rust)
tasks.description: Adapter implementing ISecretBrokerPort by reading std::env::var(). Used for agents spawned by hex-hub with injected env vars.
tasks.tests: Integration test with real env vars

tasks.title: hex-agent HubClaimAdapter (Rust)
tasks.description: Adapter implementing ISecretBrokerPort via one-shot HTTP claim to hex-hub's /secrets/claim endpoint. Uses reqwest with nonce generation.

tasks.title: Local inference LLM adapter (TypeScript)
tasks.description: Extend LLMAdapter to support 'ollama' and 'openai-compatible' providers. Route to configurable baseUrl, handle auth-optional endpoints.
tasks.tests: Unit tests with mock HTTP (ollama response format)

tasks.title: SpacetimeDB inference discovery adapter (TypeScript)
tasks.description: Adapter implementing IInferenceDiscoveryPort via SpacetimeDB subscription to inference_endpoint table.

tasks.title: hex-hub secret broker HTTP endpoint
tasks.description: POST /secrets/claim endpoint in hex-hub. Validates agent_id, checks grant exists and not expired/claimed, resolves via ISecretsPort, returns secrets, marks claimed. Rate-limited, localhost-only.
tasks.tests: Integration tests (happy path, expired, already-claimed, unknown agent)

tasks.title: Secret injection on agent spawn
tasks.description: Modify hex-hub agent spawn logic to: (1) create secret_grant in SpacetimeDB, (2) resolve secrets via ISecretsPort, (3) inject as env vars into child process, (4) mark grant as claimed.
tasks.tests: Spawn lifecycle test with mock secrets

tasks.title: Inference endpoint health checker
tasks.description: Background task in hex-hub that periodically health-checks registered inference endpoints (GET /v1/models for ollama, /health for vllm) and updates status in SpacetimeDB.

tasks.title: CLI commands: hex inference
tasks.description: New CLI subcommands: 'hex inference list', 'hex inference add <url> --provider ollama', 'hex inference remove <id>', 'hex inference health'. Registers/manages endpoints in SpacetimeDB.

tasks.title: Grant pruning scheduler
tasks.description: Background task that prunes expired secret grants and revokes grants for agents whose heartbeats have timed out.

tasks.title: Wire secret broker into hex-hub composition
tasks.description: Update hex-hub main.rs to initialize secret broker endpoint, grant pruner, and inference health checker. Wire ISecretsPort (from TypeScript side via IPC or re-implement in Rust).

tasks.title: Wire inference discovery into TypeScript composition root
tasks.description: Update composition-root.ts to use SpacetimeDB inference discovery when available, with fallback to direct LLM config.

tasks.title: E2E: agent spawn with secret injection + local inference
tasks.description: Integration test: hex-hub spawns agent with secret grant, agent resolves key, connects to mock ollama endpoint, completes inference call.

parallelism: Tiers 0-2 have parallel tasks within each tier. Tier 3 is sequential.
